title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY 1,1966 TO JUNE 30, 1967 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
H. No. 6615 / 66 OG No. 21, 5192-28 (May 25, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4856*, May 25, 1970 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES DURING THE PERIOD FROM JULY 1,1966 TO JUNE 30, 1967 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
